name: Streamarr
description: Stream Usenet content on demand through the Streamarr Core Server. Thin adapter — no download-to-disk.
overview: Surfaces the Streamarr Core Server's Usenet search results inside Jellyfin and makes them playable through Jellyfin's transcoding pipeline.
changelog: Import Sonarr/Radarr quality profiles and custom-format scores, rank releases against a portable custom-format subset, brand library artwork with cached Streamarr badges, add a per-stream diagnostics page, and add a Swiftfin playback-compatibility shim.
